strengths: 15+ years of diverse software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded systems, and AI-agent infrastructure
Proven expertise in AI-agent frameworks (MCP, Model Context Protocol) and developer tooling, aligning with AI strategy focus
Entrepreneurial background with GISCollective, demonstrating product development, open-source leadership, and strategic thinking
concerns: Limited explicit AI expertise in traditional machine learning or cloud infrastructure beyond agentic workflows
No advanced degrees (Master's/PhD) in AI-related fields, though formal education in Computer Science exists
Lack of clear leadership experience at Director-level scale, though staff roles suggest progression
response.justification: Bogdan exhibits strong technical versatility and leadership in AI-agent infrastructure, with a demonstrated ability to build and scale systems. While his AI expertise leans toward agentic workflows rather than traditional ML, his entrepreneurial projects and diverse engineering background suggest strategic thinking and adaptability. The absence of advanced AI degrees may be offset by hands-on innovation, but this remains a notable gap for a specialized AI strategy role.
